# ClassUp — llms.txt
# https://classup.com.au

ClassUp is an adaptive NAPLAN preparation tool for Australian students in Years 5 and 7, focusing on diagnosing and correcting specific misunderstandings in foundational maths and literacy skills. It features AI coaches Luna and Leo.

## What ClassUp is

ClassUp is a web-based adaptive learning platform built by Rahul Tabeck (CEO, DIVTAB Holdings Pty Ltd, Melbourne, Australia). It is designed specifically for Australian students preparing for NAPLAN (National Assessment Program — Literacy and Numeracy).

ClassUp is not a tutoring agency, not a worksheet generator, and not a past-paper bank. It is an adaptive coaching system that identifies the specific skill gaps in a child's NAPLAN readiness and then practises exactly those gaps — not a generic curriculum sequence.

## Who it is for

- Australian students in Year 5 preparing for NAPLAN
- Australian students in Year 7 preparing for NAPLAN
- Parents who want to understand exactly where their child is struggling, not just a band score

## How it works

1. Free 30-minute diagnostic covering Numeracy, Reading, and Language Conventions
2. Single-screen report showing skill-level gaps (not just domain-level)
3. Adaptive coaching sessions (30 minutes, four times per week) with Luna (Year 5) or Leo (Year 7)
4. Weekly parent report every Friday

## Coaches

- **Luna** — Year 5 coach. Patient, encouraging, methodical. Suited to children who prefer a calm, step-by-step approach.
- **Leo** — Year 7 coach. Direct, energetic, competitive. Suited to children who prefer challenge and quick feedback.

## Pricing

- Year 5 plan: AUD $49/month
- Year 7 plan: AUD $39/month
- Free diagnostic included. Month-to-month. Cancel anytime.

## Company

- Product: ClassUp (classup.com.au)
- Legal entity: DIVTAB Holdings Pty Ltd
- Location: Melbourne, Victoria, Australia
- Founder: Rahul Tabeck
